Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 赎罪教堂

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a minion +2/+1 and draw a card.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个随从获得+2/+1。抽一张牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: You'll actually find more than one tonement here.
Tag.zhCN: 人非圣贤，赎，能无过。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 树篱迷宫

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 触发一个友方随从的亡语。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: If you keep seeing a statue of the Sire, you’re not going in circles. There’s just so many of them.
Tag.zhCN: 如果你反复见到大帝的雕像，那也不能说明你在兜圈子。因为大帝的雕像太多了。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 城堡狗舍

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Give a friendly minion +2 Attack. If it's a Beast, give it Rush.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个友方随从获得+2攻击力。如果是野兽，还会使其获得突袭。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 快，装死！哦……

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 邪恶图书馆

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a friendly minion +1/+1. Repeat for each Imp you control.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个友方随从获得+1/+1。你每控制一个小鬼，重复一次。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: What type of vial library has 0 vials in it!?
Tag.zhCN: 这座图书馆肯定有鬼！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 夜隐者圣所

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Freeze a minion. Summon a 2/2 Volatile Skeleton.
Tag.zhCN: 冻结一个随从。召唤一个2/2的不稳定的骷髅。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 仅限骨干入内。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 罪碑坟场

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Summon a @/@ Ghost. (Has +1/+1 for each other card you played this turn!)
Tag.zhCN: 召唤一个@/@的幽灵。（在本回合中每有一张其他牌被使用，拥有+1/+1！）

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: A graveyard in the realm of the dead; a bit redundant, don't you think?
Tag.zhCN: 在亡者的国度修建坟场，是不是有点多余？

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 淤泥之池

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Transform a friendly minion into one that costs (1) more.
Tag.zhCN: 将一个友方随从变形成为法力值消耗增加（1）点的随从。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Making a dredger is easier than you'd think. You don't need to worry about mucking it up!
Tag.zhCN: 制作泥仆比你想象的简单，搞砸了都不怕！

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN
Tag.zhCN: 与萨满祭司职业一同解锁。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Unlocked after winning 100 games as Shaman.
Tag.zhCN: 使用萨满祭司赢得100场对战后解锁。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 圣物仓库

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: The next Relic you play this turn casts twice.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中你使用的下一个圣物将施放两次。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Holds Sire Denathrius' most prized possession - his teddy bear, Jeremy Bearimy.
Tag.zhCN: 内藏德纳修斯最珍视的宝物：他的泰迪熊，杰里米·贝里米。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 大厅

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Set a minion's Attack and Health to 3.
Tag.zhCN: 将一个随从的攻击力和生命值变为3。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: It's fabulous! It's grand! It's, well it's really very nice.
Tag.zhCN: 漂亮！大气！嗯……真的挺好的。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 赤红深渊

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 1 damage to a minion and give it +2 Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 对一个随从造成1点伤害，并使其获得+2攻击力。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: There may not be any skeletons in the closets at Castle Nathria, but there sure are souls in the basement.
Tag.zhCN: 纳斯利亚堡的衣橱里或许没有骷髅，但地下深处是真的关着灵魂。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN
Tag.zhCN: 与战士职业一同解锁。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Unlocked after winning 100 games as Warrior.
Tag.zhCN: 使用战士赢得100场对战后解锁。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 赤红岩床

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Choose a damaged minion. Summon a copy of it that goes Dormant for one turn.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个 受伤的随从，召唤一个它的休眠一回合的复制。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 唔，我觉得这是粉色。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 腐蚀之巢

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Choose a friendly Dragon. Summon a 0/2 Egg that hatches into a copy of it.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一条友方的龙。召唤一枚0/2的可以孵化成所选龙的复制的龙蛋。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 这些蛋没有黄！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 禁忌神龛

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Spend all your Mana. Cast a random spell that costs that much.
Tag.zhCN: 消耗你所有的法力值，随机施放一个法力值消耗相同的法术。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Telling me not to use something just makes me want to use it more.
Tag.zhCN: 越不让我用我越要用。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 粉丝俱乐部

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Restore #3 Health to all friendly characters.
Tag.zhCN: 为所有友方角色恢复#3点生命值。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "Well that was weird. Yeah, I just walked up to the president of the fan club, he blabbered on for like 10 minutes, and then gave me a bike voucher..."
Tag.zhCN: “说来奇怪。我走进俱乐部，找到会长，他噼里啪啦唠叨了大概10分钟，然后给了我一张自行车兑换券……”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 狂欢舞台

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 消耗3份残骸，使一个友方随从获得复生。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Let the Corpses hit the floor!
Tag.zhCN: 嗨到死去活来！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 阿梅达希尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Summon a @-Cost minion. Gain @ Armor. Draw @ |4(card, cards). Refresh @ Mana |4(Crystal, Crystals). (Improves each use!)
Tag.zhCN: 召唤一个法力值消耗为（@）的随从。获得@点护甲值。抽@张牌。复原@个法力水晶。（每使用此效果一次都会提升！）

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: The spirits burned at Teldrassil shall not be forgotten. They live on within a new world tree, the Crown of Harmony.
Tag.zhCN: 泰达希尔大火中的亡魂不会被遗忘。如今，他们寄身于这棵新的世界之树：“宁和之冠”阿梅达希尔。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 星系投影

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 法术迸发：吸收法术的能量！@施放{0}。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 闪亮舞池

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 使你的所有随从获得突袭。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: I don't think Rush would ever be here.
Tag.zhCN: 场内禁止奔跑突袭。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 木偶剧场

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Choose an enemy minion. Get a 1/1 copy of it that costs (1).
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个敌方随从，获取一张它的1/1且法力值消耗为（1）点的复制。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 现在是观众互动时间！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 构造区

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Destroy a friendly minion to summon a 4/5 Undead with Rush.
Tag.zhCN: 消灭一个友方随从，召唤一个4/5并具有突袭的亡灵。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: It's not alive! IT'S NOT ALIIIIIVE!!!
Tag.zhCN: 它不是活物！不是活物！！！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 赎罪教堂

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a minion +2/+1 and draw a card.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个随从获得+2/+1。抽一张牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: You'll actually find more than one tonement here.
Tag.zhCN: 人非圣贤，赎，能无过。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 树篱迷宫

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 触发一个友方随从的亡语。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: If you keep seeing a statue of the Sire, you’re not going in circles. There’s just so many of them.
Tag.zhCN: 如果你反复见到大帝的雕像，那也不能说明你在兜圈子。因为大帝的雕像太多了。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 城堡狗舍

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Give a friendly minion +2 Attack. If it's a Beast, give it Rush.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个友方随从获得+2攻击力。如果是野兽，还会使其获得突袭。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 快，装死！哦……

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 邪恶图书馆

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Give a friendly minion +1/+1. Repeat for each Imp you control.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个友方随从获得+1/+1。你每控制一个小鬼，重复一次。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: What type of vial library has 0 vials in it!?
Tag.zhCN: 这座图书馆肯定有鬼！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 夜隐者圣所

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Freeze a minion. Summon a 2/2 Volatile Skeleton.
Tag.zhCN: 冻结一个随从。召唤一个2/2的不稳定的骷髅。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 仅限骨干入内。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 罪碑坟场

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Summon a @/@ Ghost. (Has +1/+1 for each other card you played this turn!)
Tag.zhCN: 召唤一个@/@的幽灵。（在本回合中每有一张其他牌被使用，拥有+1/+1！）

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: A graveyard in the realm of the dead; a bit redundant, don't you think?
Tag.zhCN: 在亡者的国度修建坟场，是不是有点多余？

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 城堡狗舍

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 快，装死！哦……

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 赎罪教堂

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: You'll actually find more than one tonement here.
Tag.zhCN: 人非圣贤，赎，能无过。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 树篱迷宫

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: If you keep seeing a statue of the Sire, you’re not going in circles. There’s just so many of them.
Tag.zhCN: 如果你反复见到大帝的雕像，那也不能说明你在兜圈子。因为大帝的雕像太多了。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 赤红深渊

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: There may not be any skeletons in the closets at Castle Nathria, but there sure are souls in the basement.
Tag.zhCN: 纳斯利亚堡的衣橱里或许没有骷髅，但地下深处是真的关着灵魂。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 大厅

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: It's fabulous! It's grand! It's, well it's really very nice.
Tag.zhCN: 漂亮！大气！嗯……真的挺好的。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 罪碑坟场

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: A graveyard in the realm of the dead; a bit redundant, don't you think?
Tag.zhCN: 在亡者的国度修建坟场，是不是有点多余？

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 夜隐者圣所

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 仅限骨干入内。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 圣物仓库

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Holds Sire Denathrius' most prized possession - his teddy bear, Jeremy Bearimy.
Tag.zhCN: 内藏德纳修斯最珍视的宝物：他的泰迪熊，杰里米·贝里米。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 淤泥之池

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Making a dredger is easier than you'd think. You don't need to worry about mucking it up!
Tag.zhCN: 制作泥仆比你想象的简单，搞砸了都不怕！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 邪恶图书馆

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: What type of vial library has 0 vials in it!?
Tag.zhCN: 这座图书馆肯定有鬼！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 淤泥之池

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Transform a friendly minion into one that costs (1) more.
Tag.zhCN: 将一个友方随从变形成为法力值消耗增加（1）点的随从。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Making a dredger is easier than you'd think. You don't need to worry about mucking it up!
Tag.zhCN: 制作泥仆比你想象的简单，搞砸了都不怕！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 圣物仓库

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: The next Relic you play this turn casts twice.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中你使用的下一个圣物将施放两次。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Holds Sire Denathrius' most prized possession - his teddy bear, Jeremy Bearimy.
Tag.zhCN: 内藏德纳修斯最珍视的宝物：他的泰迪熊，杰里米·贝里米。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 大厅

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Set a minion's Attack and Health to 3.
Tag.zhCN: 将一个随从的攻击力和生命值变为3。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: It's fabulous! It's grand! It's, well it's really very nice.
Tag.zhCN: 漂亮！大气！嗯……真的挺好的。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 赤红深渊

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 1 damage to a minion and give it +2 Attack.
Tag.zhCN: 对一个随从造成1点伤害，并使其获得+2攻击力。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: There may not be any skeletons in the closets at Castle Nathria, but there sure are souls in the basement.
Tag.zhCN: 纳斯利亚堡的衣橱里或许没有骷髅，但地下深处是真的关着灵魂。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 孵化池

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Get a 1/1 Zergling. Deathrattle: Your Zerg minions have Rush this turn.
Tag.zhCN: 获取一张1/1的跳虫。亡语：在本回合中，你的异虫随从拥有突袭。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Looks more like a spawning hot tub to me, just based on the size.
Tag.zhCN: 从尺寸上来看，我觉得这更像是个孵化浴缸。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 雷兽窟

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 1 damage to all enemies. Deathrattle: Summon an 8/8 Ultralisk with Rush.
Tag.zhCN: 对所有敌人造成1点伤害。亡语：召唤一只8/8并具有突袭的雷兽。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Don't let your ultralisk get stuck on a ramp.
Tag.zhCN: 注意别把你的雷兽卡在这段坡道上。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 星港

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Summon a 2/1 Starship_Piece with an effect when launched.
Tag.zhCN: 召唤一个2/1并具有一项发射时效果的星舰组件。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Make sure to arrive 3 light-years early for any intergalactic flights.
Tag.zhCN: 乘坐跨星系航线的旅客，请提前3光年准备，以便抵达星港。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 折跃门

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Your next Protoss minion costs (3) less.
Tag.zhCN: 你的下一张星灵随从牌的法力值消耗减少（3）点。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: This is gonna be really meta-warping.
Tag.zhCN: 看来环境又要提速了。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 过去的诺莫瑞根

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 使一个随从获得+2/+1。推进到现在！

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Before the trogg invasion, Gnomeregan was a thriving, high-tech metropolis.
Tag.zhCN: 穴居人侵入之前，诺莫瑞根曾是一座欣欣向荣，科技发达的大都市。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 现在的诺莫瑞根

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Give a minion +2/+1 and "Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero." Advance to the future!
Tag.zhCN: 使一个随从获得+2/+1和“亡语：对敌方英雄造成2点伤害。”推进到未来！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 未来的诺莫瑞根

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Give a minion +2/+1, Divine_Shield, and "Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero."
Tag.zhCN: 使一个随从获得+2/+1，圣盾和“亡语：对敌方英雄造成2点伤害。”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 永恒之井

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Fill your hand with random Temporary spells.
Tag.zhCN: 用随机的临时法术牌填满你的手牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 永恒之井

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Fill your hand with random Temporary spells. They cast twice.
Tag.zhCN: 用随机的临时法术牌填满你的手牌，这些牌会施放两次。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 辛艾萨莉

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Summon a copy of a friendly minion.
Tag.zhCN: 召唤一个友方随从的一个复制。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 辛艾萨莉

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Summon a copy of a friendly minion with its stats doubled.
Tag.zhCN: 召唤一个友方随从的一个具有翻倍属性值的复制。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 过去的时光流汇

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Summon a random Dragon that costs (5) or more. Advance to the present!
Tag.zhCN: 随机召唤一条法力值消耗大于或等于（5）点的龙。推进到现在！

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: For millennia, magic shrouded the Temporal Conflux and the rest of the Dragon Isles from all of Azeroth — even the dragonflights themselves.
Tag.zhCN: 万年以来，魔法笼罩着时光流汇以及整片巨龙群岛，将其与艾泽拉斯的其余地区隔绝开来——哪怕是巨龙军团自己也无法接近。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 现在的时光流汇

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Discover a Dragon that costs (5) or more and summon it. Advance to the future!
Tag.zhCN: 发现并召唤一条法力值消耗大于或等于（5）点的龙。推进到未来！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 未来的时光流汇

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Discover a Dragon that costs (5) or more and summon it. Also get a copy of it.
Tag.zhCN: 发现并召唤一条法力值消耗大于或等于（5）点的龙，并获取一张它的复制。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 永时坚垒

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Discover any Demon that costs (5) or more. If your deck has no minions, your next one costs (0).
Tag.zhCN: 发现一张法力值消耗大于或等于（5）点的任意恶魔牌。如果你的牌库中没有随从牌，你的下一张随从牌法力值消耗为（0）点。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "...stay on the line, our customer service representative will speak with you soon..."
Tag.zhCN: 用时间垒成的坚垒，永时坚垒。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 过去的银月城

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 5 damage to a random enemy minion. Advance to the present!
Tag.zhCN: 随机对一个敌方随从造成5点伤害。推进到现在！

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: For nearly seven thousand years, Silvermoon stood unblemished as the crown jewel of Quel'Thalas. But that was before the Lich King came.
Tag.zhCN: 银月城巍然屹立近七千年，堪称奎尔萨拉斯王冠上的明珠。可那都是巫妖王进军之前的事了。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 现在的银月城

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 5 damage to a random enemy minion. Excess hits the enemy hero. Advance to the future!
Tag.zhCN: 随机对一个敌方随从造成5点伤害，超过目标生命值的伤害会命中敌方英雄。推进到未来！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 未来的银月城

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 5 damage to the lowest Health enemy minion. Excess damage hits the enemy hero.
Tag.zhCN: 对生命值最低的敌方随从造成5点伤害，超过目标生命值的伤害会命中敌方英雄。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 圣地卡拉赞

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Costs (0) if you're wielding Atiesh. Summon two random 8-Cost minions.
Tag.zhCN: 如果你装备着埃提耶什，本牌的法力值消耗为（0）点。随机召唤两个法力值消耗为（8）的随从。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 安戈洛丛林

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 恐惧小道

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 火羽山

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 恐怖之墓

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 造成4点伤害。亡语：再次召唤泰拉克斯，魔骸暴龙。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 血瓣群系

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 发现一张临时的法力值消耗为（1）的随从牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 过敏的症状可不是临时的。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 丛林乐园

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 1 damage to a random enemy. Repeat for each friendly Beast.
Tag.zhCN: 随机对一个敌人 造成1点伤害。每有一只友方野兽，重复一次。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Yeah, I work out at the gym. The one with all the plushies and toys.
Tag.zhCN: 对，我去丛林里探险了，那里到处都是玩具。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 童话林地

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 抽一张战吼随从牌，其法力值消耗减少（1）点。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Man, I wish fairy tales were real, Durg'tash the Sorcerer.
Tag.zhCN: 哇，巫师杜格塔什，我希望童话里都是真的。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 水晶海湾

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]The next minion you summon this turn has its stats set to 4/4.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中，你召唤的下一个随从的属性值变为4/4。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: For some strange reason, everyone that hangs out at the Crystal Cove has the same name...
Tag.zhCN: 出于某种奇怪的原因，水晶海湾的每位游客都叫同一个名字……

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 魔法妙妙屋

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中获得法术伤害+1。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Build your own dollhouse in 3 easy steps! 1. Build a castle. 2. Miniaturize it. 3. GLITTER!
Tag.zhCN: 打造自己的玩具屋，只需3步！1.修建一座城堡。2.微缩城堡。3.加光效！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 尤格-萨隆的监狱

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Choose a character. Cast 4 random spells (targeting it if possible).
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个角色。随机施放4个法术（尽可能以其为目标）。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: "We've finally captured Yogg-Saron! How should we keep him contained?" "How about... an open pit... right below us... with four loose chains?" "PERFECT!"
Tag.zhCN: “我们终于控制住了尤格-萨隆！该怎么关押他呢？”“在地底……挖一个浅坑……随便拴上四条链子……如何？”“完美！”

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN
Tag.enUS: Earnable after opening a TITANS card pack.
Tag.zhCN: 打开泰坦诸神卡牌包后可解锁。

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Earnable after purchasing the TITANS Tavern Pass.
Tag.zhCN: 购买泰坦诸神炉石通行证后开放解锁。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 意志熔炉

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Choose a friendly minion. Summon a Giant with its stats and Rush.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个友方随从。召唤一个具有其属性值和突袭的 巨人。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Standing in the Forge of Wills fills you with a sense of DETERMINATION.
Tag.zhCN: 身处意志熔炉之中，你会感受到决心的力量。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 小玩物小屋

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Draw a card. If you play it this turn, reopen this.
Tag.zhCN: 抽一张牌。如果你在本回合中使用抽到的这张牌，重新开启本地标。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: In a hole in the ground there... was a tourist trap?
Tag.zhCN: 在一处温暖而舒适的地洞里，有一个……游客陷阱？

Tag.name: HOW_TO_EARN_GOLDEN
Tag.enUS: Earnable on the Perils in Paradise Reward Track.
Tag.zhCN: 可以在胜地历险记奖励路线中获得该奖励。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 鹦鹉乐园

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Your next Battlecry minion costs (1) less. After you play a Battlecry minion, reopen this.
Tag.zhCN: 你的下一张战吼随从牌的法力值消耗减少（1）点。在你使用一张战吼随从牌后，重新开启本地标。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: Did you know? It's very loud in a parrot sanctuary. This has been bird facts with Ranger Gilly.
Tag.zhCN: 你知道吗？鹦鹉乐园里是很吵的。——园林护卫者基利

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 大地之末号

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Deal 3 damage randomly split among all enemies. After a friendly minion dies, reopen this.
Tag.zhCN: 造成3点伤害，随机分配到所有敌人身上。在一个友方随从死亡后，重新开启本地标。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 票选出来的名字叫“皮皮虾号”。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 远足步道

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Discover a Taunt minion. After you gain Armor, reopen this.
Tag.zhCN: 发现一张嘲讽随从牌。在你获得护甲值后，重新开启本地标。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: “你在哪？”“步道啊！”

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 潮汐之池

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Discover a spell that costs (3) or less. After you cast a spell, reopen this.
Tag.zhCN: 发现一张法力值消耗小于或等于（3）点的法术牌。在你施放一个法术后，重新开启本地标。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: I know they look delicious but do NOT eat them.
Tag.zhCN: 我知道它们看起来很好吃，但切记请勿食用。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 圣沙泽尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Give a friendly minion +@ Attack and Rush. Turn back into a minion.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个友方随从获得+@攻击力和突袭。变回随从。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 惊险悬崖

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Summon two 1/1 Pirates with Charge. After your hero attacks, reopen this.
Tag.zhCN: 召唤两个1/1并具有冲锋的海盗。在你的英雄攻击后，重新开启本地标。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: It's not as dangerous as it looks… IT'S EVEN MORE DANGEROUS!
Tag.zhCN: 并不像看上去那么危险……而是危险得多！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 塞纳里奥要塞

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Your next Choose One card this turn has both effects combined.
Tag.zhCN: 在本回合中，你的下一张抉择牌同时拥有两种效果。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.enUS: After the War of the Shifting Sands, Cenarion Hold became a strategic outpost, awaiting the moment when the armies of C'Thun would rise once again.
Tag.zhCN: 在流沙之战后，塞纳里奥要塞变成了一座战略前哨站，时刻提防克苏恩的大军卷土重来。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 洛丹伦城郊

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Choose a minion. Destroy all minions with less Attack than it.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个随从，消灭所有攻击力小于它的随从。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 双足飞龙栖木

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Summon a random 3-Cost minion. Give it Charge.
Tag.zhCN: 随机召唤一个法力值消耗为（3）的随从。使其获得冲锋。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 泽尼达尔

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Your next Battlecry this turn triggers twice.
Tag.zhCN: 你在本回合中的下一个战吼将触发两次。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 暗夜要塞

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 随机施放三个圣骑士奥秘。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 瓦德拉肯

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 获取两张具有+2/+2的随机龙牌。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 寇茹废墟

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 抽两张牌，交换其法力值消耗。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 大地神殿

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Choose a friendly minion. Summon a copy of it with +3_Health and Taunt that can't attack.
Tag.zhCN: 选择一个友方随从。召唤一个它的具有+3生命值和嘲讽且无法攻击的复制。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 维希度斯的窟穴

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: [x]Look at 3 cards in your hand and choose one to discard. Draw two cards.
Tag.zhCN: 检视你手牌中的三张牌，选择一张弃掉。抽两张牌。

Tag.name: FLAVORTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 这个洞窟有多少年了？有好多黏！

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 魔拳岩

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.zhCN: 将一个随从的属性值变为6/7。

Tag.name: CARDNAME
Tag.zhCN: 荒芜之地监狱

Tag.name: CARDTEXT
Tag.enUS: Make a minion go Dormant for 3 turns.
Tag.zhCN: 使一个随从休眠3回合。
